title: The First Awakening
description: The king's golem has been stirring. Three test results have been recorded — use them, plus a research note, to determine which two ingredients will animate it.

hints.text: The golem reacts to SIZE, not sign. The chest reacts to a specific color+size combination. The research note tells you the chest reacts to Red. Look at which test made the chest react — that ingredient has a Large Red aspect.

ingredient 1 triggered both chest and ears — it is an animator. The ears reacted to ingredient 2 but not the chest, and neither reacted to ingredient 7. You need to find the second animator: another ingredient that triggers both reactions.

Animators have both Large Red and Small Green aspects. Alchemicals with Large Red are Nnp(5), Ppn(6), NNN(7), PPP(8). Of those, Small Green is only on Nnp(5) and Ppn(6). ingredient 1 maps to Nnp — ingredient 3 maps to Ppn. The animators are ingredients 1 and 3.
